Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blue Divine Titan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — The Blue Divine Titan is a ship where the Captain once faced a slipwraith.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — The Blue Divine Titan is more advanced than other Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — The Blue Divine Titan has smooth and bright blue plates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — The Blue Divine Titan's helmet design evokes a hood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The Blue Divine Titan has a massive staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — The Blue Divine Titan amplifies all acts of Aether manipulation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — The Blue Divine Titan is a metal behemoth that shines bright blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Piloting a Divine Titan requires a relationship between Knight and Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — The Blue Divine Titan has a pilot's seat revealed by an opening chest plate.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
